---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Harmony
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it Solves

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Is your feature request related to a problem?

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, share them here.

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Can't use Harmony without it
- [ ] High - Would greatly improve experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Would be cool but not essential

## Federation Compatibility

Does this feature need to work with ActivityPub federation?
- [ ] Yes, must be federated
- [ ] No, local-only is fine
- [ ] Optional federation support

## Are you willing to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] No, just suggesting
